howItWorks.intro: This squat max calculator uses standard formulas to provide accurate results.
howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.question: What is a good squat?
faq.answer: For men: 1.5× body weight is intermediate, 2× is advanced, 2.5× is elite. For women: 1× BW is intermediate, 1.5× is advanced.

faq.question: How accurate is this?
faq.answer: Epley formula is accurate within 5% for 2-10 reps. High rep sets (15+) tend to overestimate.

faq.question: Back squat vs front squat?
faq.answer: Front squat is typically 80-85% of back squat max. Different movement patterns stress quads and core differently.

faq.question: How do I increase my squat?
faq.answer: Progressive overload: add 5 lbs per session for beginners, 5 lbs per week for intermediates. Focus on depth, form, and consistent training.
